# Week 11: Measured Outcomes From Recent Iterations

Date: 2026-04-29

This update summarizes measurable outcomes from three flagship repositories using baseline-tag to current comparisons.

## 1) hallucination-lens

Baseline: `v0.2.0`

- Production checklist coverage: `12/12 -> 12/12`
- Markdown docs in `docs/`: `5 -> 6`
- CI or release workflows: `2 -> 3`
- Test files in `tests/`: `3 -> 12`

Latency evidence:

- Runtime harness mean latency (ms) at dataset size 2, 5, 10: `0.1929`, `0.2467`, `0.2832`

Evidence: [hallucination-lens outcomes doc](https://github.com/Ramdragneel01/hallucination-lens/blob/main/docs/WEEK11_MEASURED_OUTCOMES.md)

## 2) context-watchdog

Baseline: `v0.1.0`

- Production checklist coverage: `12/12 -> 12/12`
- Markdown docs in `docs/`: `3 -> 5`
- CI or release workflows: `2 -> 3`
- Test files in `tests/`: `1 -> 6`

Latency evidence (300 iterations per policy recipe):

- Regulated evidence avg or p95 ms: `0.502` or `0.793`
- Realtime support avg or p95 ms: `0.522` or `0.864`

## 3) agentic-research-assistant

Baseline: `v0.2.2`

- Production checklist coverage: `12/12 -> 12/12`
- Markdown docs in `docs/`: `5 -> 8`
- CI or release workflows: `2 -> 3`
- Test files in `tests/`: `2 -> 12`

Cost proxy evidence:

- Source budget caps by execution tier: `small=3`, `medium=5`, `large=8`

Evidence: [agentic-research-assistant outcomes doc](https://github.com/Ramdragneel01/agentic-research-assistant/blob/main/docs/WEEK11_MEASURED_OUTCOMES.md)

## Summary

1. Reliability evidence improved in all three repositories through expanded tests and automation depth.
2. Latency and cost proxy evidence is now documented in repo-level outcomes artifacts.
3. Public portfolio now links directly to measured outcomes, not only implementation notes.
